news.title: Indian bonds gain as soft US inflation cools Fed rate hike bets
news.description: Indian government bonds saw gains as US inflation eased, reducing immediate rate hike fears.  Treasury yields declined, prompting a similar trend in Indian overnight index swap rates.  Markets largely overlooked rising oil prices and their impact on domestic inflation. news.title: Bitcoin climbs to $64,700 as softer US inflation eases US Fed rate hike concerns
news.description: Bitcoin rebounded to around $64,700 after softer-than-expected US inflation data weakened the dollar and eased concerns over near-term Fed rate hikes. news.title: Rupee edges higher; options market gauge turns most bearish in over a month
news.description: The Indian rupee strengthened modestly on Wednesday against the U.S. dollar. Easing U.S. Federal Reserve rate hike bets supported the rupee's upward movement. news.title: UK to issue first 'digital' bond by early 2027, finance minister says
news.description: Britain aims to become the first major economy to issue a digital sovereign bond.  This initiative will test distributed-ledger technology for capital markets efficiency.  The Bank of England will ensure the digital gilt can be used as collateral.  HSBC was selected in February to manage the blockch

news.title: China CITIC Bank International plans dollar, offshore yuan perpetual bonds
news.description: China CITIC Bank International plans to issue perpetual bonds in US dollars and offshore yuan.  Initial price guidance is set around 5.45% for dollar bonds and 2.90% for yuan bonds.  These benchmark-sized deals will strengthen the lender's capital base and absorb potential losses. news.title: Why clinical credibility, not marketing claims, builds lasting consumer trust
news.description: In a market where every other skincare brand claims to be science-backed, Pranay Rao, VP marketing, CPD, Sebamed, believes consumers should look beyond ingredients and influencers to the clinical evidence behind every claim.

news.title: TPG, Sofina, Multiples in race to pick up $80-100 million stake in Giva
news.description: Jewellery startup Giva is in advanced talks with private equity investors including TPG, Sofina and Multiples for an $80-100 million funding round that could value the company at about  ₹6,000 crore.

news.title: Gold prices snap 2-day fall, silver at Rs 2.18 lakh/kg despite rising oil prices, rate hike fears. Key levels to watch today
news.description: Gold and silver prices rebounded on MCX on Tuesday, snapping a two-session losing streak, as escalating US-Iran tensions boosted safe-haven demand. Investors are now awaiting the U.S. June CPI data for fresh cues on inflation and the Federal Reserve's interes…

news.title: Olympio bags high-grade US silver and antimony plays
news.description: Olympio Metals has completed the acquisition of two US critical minerals projects, picking up historic silver-copper and antimony projects that have seen no modern exploration.

news.title: Gold Holds Decline on Renewed Hormuz Blockade and Hawkish Fed
news.description: Gold held a decline as escalating hostilities in the Strait of Hormuz and remarks by a US monetary policymaker raised the likelihood of interest-rate hikes to contain inflation.

news.title: Solis launches Brazilian drill assault on 800m lithium corridor
news.description: Solis Minerals has started a 2000-metre diamond drill campaign at its Mandacaru lithium project in Brazil’s revered Araçuaí Valley, with a parallel copper drilling program in Peru also set to begin.

news.title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
news.description: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.
